summary: P0 HOTFIX REGRESSION VALIDATION COMPLETE - BOTH FIXES VERIFIED. 1) KYC Queue now displays full personal info (full_name, nationality, country, address, date_of_birth, tax_residency, documents) when clicking application. 2) Tax Hold Amount now shows €4,157.00 correctly instead of €0. 17/17 backend API tests pass (100%). UI verification complete.

kyc_queue_fix.before: Clicking KYC application showed blank panel with 'Select an application to review'
kyc_queue_fix.after: Personal Information section displays: Full Name, Date of Birth, Nationality, Country, Address, Tax Residency. Documents section shows PASSPORT, PROOF_OF_ADDRESS, SELFIE with View buttons.
kyc_queue_fix.fix_location: backend/routers/kyc.py:187-206 - /admin/kyc/pending endpoint now returns personal info fields

tax_hold_fix.after: Tax Hold Amount correctly shows €4.157,00 for user hannan1979ma@yahoo.com (ID: 699c203fda173e07eee262b3)
tax_hold_fix.fix_location: backend/routers/admin_users.py:869 - Now reads tax_amount_cents field instead of tax_amount_due

test_evidence.admin_overview: PASS - Dashboard loads with stats (91 users, 74 active, 1 pending KYC, 132 transactions)
test_evidence.admin_users: PASS - List loads with pagination, TAX flag visible for tax hold users

critical_code_review_comments: KYC pending endpoint fix correctly returns all personal info fields from kyc_applications collection
Tax hold fix correctly reads tax_amount_cents (not tax_amount_due) - matches database field name
Both fixes are backward compatible with existing data
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 HOTFIXES VALIDATED. KYC Queue shows personal info when clicking application. Tax Hold shows correct €4,157.00 instead of €0. All admin features working: Overview, Users, KYC Queue, Accounts, Card Requests, Transfers Queue (all tabs), Support Tickets, Audit Logs, Notifications. Platform is stable.

kyc_queue_bug.root_cause: The /admin/kyc/pending endpoint was not returning personal information fields (full_name, nationality, country, street_address, city, postal_code, tax_residency, date_of_birth, tax_id) that the frontend expected to display in the details panel
kyc_queue_bug.fix_applied: Added these fields to the response at lines 197-205 in kyc.py

tax_hold_bug.root_cause: The get_user_tax_hold endpoint was reading 'tax_amount_due' field but database stores amount in 'tax_amount_cents' field
tax_hold_bug.fix_applied: Changed line 869 to read tax_amount_cents instead of tax_amount_due
